chapter_title.ar: باب الْعِلَّةِ فِي غُسْلِ الْمَيِّتِ غُسْلَ الْجَنَابَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 32 – The reason regarding washing the deceased and washing from the sexual impurity

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/345)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/345)
text: قَالَ إِنَّ الْمَخْلُوقَ لَا يَمُوتُ حَتَّى تَخْرُجَ مِنْهُ النُّطْفَةُ الَّتِي خُلِقَ مِنْهَا مِنْ فِيهِ أَوْ مِنْ عَيْنِهِ .

en.hubeali: One of our companions, from Ali Bin Al Hassan Al Maysami, from Haroun Bin Hamza, from one of our companions,

(It has been narrated) from Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The creature is not dying until the seed comes out from him, that which he was Created from, either from his mouth, or from his eyes’.
en.sarwar: 3. Certain persons of our people have narrated from Ali ibn al-Hassan al-Mithamiy from Harun ibn Hamzah from certain persons of our people who has said the following: “Ali ibn al-Husayn, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that a creature does not die until the seed from which it is created comes out through his mouth or his eye.”
